---
title: "Candidatos en watchlist"
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
project_dir <- normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
source(file.path(project_dir, "R", "site_helpers.R"))

candidates <- read_candidate_registry_public(project_dir) |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$watchlist_active %in% TRUE) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$watchlist_priority, .data$ballot_position)
dossiers <- read_processed_table("candidate_dossiers.csv", project_dir = project_dir)
claims <- read_processed_table("claim_records.csv", project_dir = project_dir)
taxonomy <- read_taxonomy_public(project_dir)
taxonomy_lookup <- taxonomy_root_lookup_public(taxonomy)

cat('<p class="section-intro">Esta página prioriza sólo la watchlist. Las candidaturas de cobertura secundaria quedan fuera de esta vista para concentrar el análisis en propuestas, ideologías y diferencias políticas sustantivas.</p>')

cards <- purrr::pmap_chr(candidates, function(candidate_id, slug, president_name, vicepresident_name, ballot_position, watchlist_active, watchlist_priority, photo_url = "", photo_alt = "", photo_credit = "", photo_source_url = "", ...) {
  dossier <- dossiers |> dplyr::filter(.data$candidate_id == candidate_id)
  ideology_label <- if (nrow(dossier) == 0) "Lectura ideológica en construcción" else dossier$ideology_label[[1]]
  policy_summary <- homepage_candidate_summary(candidate_id, claims, taxonomy_lookup)

  photo_html <- if (!is.na(photo_url) && photo_url != "") {
    paste0('<img class="candidate-card__photo" src="', escape_html(photo_url), '" alt="', escape_html(photo_alt %||% president_name), '">')
  } else {
    ""
  }

  paste0(
    '<article class="candidate-card candidate-card--feature">',
    photo_html,
    '<div class="candidate-card__body">',
    '<span class="candidate-badge">Watchlist #', watchlist_priority, '</span>',
    '<h3><a href="', slug, '.html">', president_name, '</a></h3>',
    '<p class="candidate-card__meta"><strong>Vicepresidencia:</strong> ', vicepresident_name, '</p>',
    '<p class="candidate-card__meta"><strong>Ubicación ideológica:</strong> ', ideology_label, '</p>',
    '<p class="narrative-paragraph">', escape_html(policy_summary), '</p>',
    '<a class="card-link" href="', slug, '.html">Leer propuestas y análisis</a>',
    '</div>',
    '</article>'
  )
})

cat(paste0('<div class="candidate-grid candidate-grid--feature">', paste(cards, collapse = ""), '</div>'))
```
